source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An automotive radiator has glycerine at 95\circ\text{C} enter and return at 55\circ\text{C}. Air flows in at 20\circ\text{C} and leaves at 25◦C. If the radiator should transfer 25 kW, what is the volume flow rate of air in at 100 kPa?
